finding.summary: The track contains very sparse audio (88% silence), making level and loudness measurements unreliable.
finding.probable_cause: The audio capture is dominated by silence; the kick hits are infrequent, so average RMS and integrated LUFS are artificially low and crest factor is overestimated relative to program material.
finding.confidence_reason: Confidence is capped at low because audio.silence_fraction is 0.880.

evidence_refs.description: High silence fraction (0.88) indicates sparse audio, diluting all level statistics.

proposal.reason: High silence fraction prevents a reliable diagnosis or safe adjustment. No move recommended until a sustained audio segment is captured.
